title: Immersive Portals for (Neo)Forge
description: See through portals and go through them seamlessly without a loading screen.
body:
This is Immersive Portals for (Neo)Forge. **[Here's the Fabric version](https://modrinth.com/mod/immersiveportals).** 

**There's an Important Notes and FAQ section at the bottom of this description. Please take your time and read it.**

* * *

See through portals and go through them seamlessly without a loading screen.
============================================================================

![](https://i.loli.net/2021/05/12/UlJ3zdESNyZWmxG.png)

### Other Features:

*   [Enhanced End Portals](https://qouteall.fun/immptl/wiki/Portals#end-portals)
*   [Mirrors](https://qouteall.fun/immptl/wiki/Portals#mirrors)
*   [Commands for Creating Custom Portals](https://qouteall.fun/immptl/wiki/Portal-Customization)
*   [Datapack Based Custom Portal Generation](https://qouteall.fun/immptl/wiki/Datapack-Based-Custom-Portal-Generation)
*   [World Wrapping](https://qouteall.fun/immptl/wiki/Portals#world-wrapping-portal)
*   [Dimension Stack](https://qouteall.fun/immptl/wiki/Dimension-Stack)
*   See the [Wiki](https://qouteall.fun/immptl/wiki) for more information.

* * *

### Dependencies:

The **1.14 and 1.15** version of this mod depend on [MixinBootstrap](https://modrinth.com/mod/mixinbootstrap).

All **versions after 1.19** of this mod depend on [Cloth Config API](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config).

* * *

### Contact:

[Report Issues](https://github.com/qouteall/ImmersivePortalsModForForge/issues)

[Discord Server](https://discord.gg/BZxgURK)

* * *

### Important Notes and FAQ:

*   **It's NOT recommended to use the versions for MC 1.16.x because it's heavily outdated and incompatible with Forge's dynamic dimension feature.**
*   **ALWAYS BACKUP YOUR EXISTING WORLD(S) WHEN ADDING A NEW MOD.**
*   **Q**: I ran into an issue with this mod, what should I do?  
    **A**: See the contact section above and open an issue on GitHub and/or leave a message in the #help-forge-version channel in our Discord Server.
*   **Q**: \[MC Version\] when?  
    **A**: When it's ready! Please stop asking, I'm aware when a new MC version is released.
*   **Q**: What MC versions are supported?  
    **A**: See the support matrix below:

|                       |1.14.4 |1.15.2 |1.16.5 |1.18.2 |1.19.2 |1.19.3 |🦊 1.20.4 |🦊 1.21.1 | 
| --------------------- |:----: |:----: |:----: |:----: |:----: |:----: |:------: |:------: |
| In development        |       |       |       |       |       |       |          |  |
| Supported             |       |       |       |       |       |       |         |✅ |
| Fixes only on request |       |       |       |       |       |       |         |  |
| Pull requests only    |       |       |       |🔀     |🔀      |      | 🔀       |  |
| End of support        |⚠️     |⚠️     |⚠️     |       |        |⚠️     |         |  |
 

__**Note:**__ All versions that are not mentioned in the matrix that are older than the latest version mentioned in the support matrix are **explicitly not planned**. All versions newer then the latest version mentioned are **under consideration**. **Please stop asking for them**. All versions marked with 🦊 are NeoForge versions.
